name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: ''
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem or motivation

What problem would this solve, or what workflow would it improve?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of the feature you'd like (e.g. a new flag, output format, or provider).

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Examples, mockups, or links to similar behaviour in other tools.
